case_title: CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. VS. CLAFOUTIS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-15-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CLAFOUTIS, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-25-2010
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. SERVED JUN-17-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLAFOUTIS, INC.
